name: Anise Cookie Slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together butter and cream cheese.
2. Add powdered sugar, beating until well blended.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating thoroughly after each addition (the mixture may appear curdled).
4. Incorporate the remaining ingredients; mix until combined.
5. Chill dough for 3 hours.
6. Divide the soft dough into two portions.
7. On a 17 by 14 inch baking sheet, shape each portion of dough into a roll that is 1-1/2 inches wide and extends along the length of the sheet.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 to 35 minutes.
9. Remove from the oven and cut the rolls into 3/4 inch slices.
10. Place the slices on baking sheets with the cut side down, then return them to the oven to bake for an additional 10 minutes or until they are toasted and crisp.
11. This recipe yields approximately 48 slices.
Note: Reprinted with permission from From our Private Collection From the C & H Sugar Kitchen
